query:
INSERT INTO document_templates (template_name, category, subcategory, description) VALUES
-- Employment Documents
('Employment Offer Letter', 'employment', 'hiring', 'Standard employment offer letter'),
('Employment Agreement', 'employment', 'hiring', 'Full employment agreement with terms'),
('Form I-9 Employment Eligibility', 'employment', 'compliance', 'Employment eligibility verification'),
('Form W-4 Withholding Certificate', 'employment', 'tax', 'Employee withholding certificate'),
('Form W-2 Wage Statement', 'employment', 'tax', 'Annual wage and tax statement'),
('Form 1099-NEC', 'employment', 'tax', 'Nonemployee compensation'),
('Independent Contractor Agreement', 'employment', 'contractor', 'Agreement for independent contractors'),
('Termination Letter', 'employment', 'separation', 'Employment termination notice'),

-- Business Formation Documents
('Articles of Incorporation', 'business_formation', 'corporation', 'Corporate formation document'),
('Articles of Organization', 'business_formation', 'llc', 'LLC formation document'),
('Operating Agreement', 'business_formation', 'llc', 'LLC operating agreement'),
('Corporate Bylaws', 'business_formation', 'corporation', 'Corporate governance bylaws'),
('EIN Application SS-4', 'business_formation', 'tax', 'Employer identification number application'),
('Business License Application', 'business_formation', 'licensing', 'General business license application'),

-- Trust Documents
('Trust Agreement', 'trust', 'formation', 'Family trust agreement'),
('Trust Amendment', 'trust', 'modification', 'Amendment to existing trust'),
('Certificate of Trust', 'trust', 'certification', 'Trust existence certification'),
('Trustee Appointment', 'trust', 'governance', 'Appointment of trustee'),

-- 508 Organization Documents
('508 Declaration Letter', '508_organization', 'formation', 'Declaration of 508(c)(1)(a) status'),
('Donation Receipt', '508_organization', 'donations', 'Tax-deductible donation receipt'),
('Annual Donor Summary', '508_organization', 'donations', 'Year-end giving summary'),
('Member Benefit Statement', '508_organization', 'membership', 'Statement of member benefits received');
